.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6573:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2760:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:283:| Phase `001-runtime-truth-foundation` | Internal | Green | Graph convergence would have no legal stop-decision envelope to extend. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6574:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2761:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:304:- **Trigger**: Graph extraction breaks existing graph behavior, or graph convergence produces incorrect legal STOP decisions.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6575:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2762:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/plan.md:307:  2. Revert reducer convergence back to Phase 001 scalar-only behavior.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6576:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2764:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:3:description: "Coverage-graph substrate for deep-loop convergence: 4 CJS shared libraries, dedicated SQLite database, 4 MCP tools, reducer integration seam, and 101 graph tests."
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6577:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2767:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:35:Semantic convergence now has a concrete graph substrate. Deep research and deep review can track coverage gaps, contradictions, provenance chains, and unverified claims through a dedicated SQLite database and four MCP tools, all backed by shared CJS libraries extracted from the existing Spec Kit Memory graph infrastructure.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6578:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2768:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:39:Four CommonJS shared libraries were extracted and adapted from existing graph modules: `coverage-graph-core.cjs` (edge management, weight clamping, self-loop prevention, provenance traversal), `coverage-graph-signals.cjs` (degree, depth, momentum, cluster metrics), `coverage-graph-contradictions.cjs` (CONTRADICTS-edge scanning, contradiction-pair reporting), and `coverage-graph-convergence.cjs` (graph-aware convergence helpers combining graph signals with Phase 001 stop-trace inputs). Reuse posture was 35-45% direct, 25-30% adapted, with the remainder genuinely new loop semantics.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6579:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2770:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:47:Four MCP handlers were added to the existing Spec Kit Memory server: `deep_loop_graph_upsert` (idempotent node/edge creation with self-loop rejection and clamped weights), `deep_loop_graph_query` (structured queries for uncovered questions, unverified claims, contradictions, provenance chains, coverage gaps, and hot nodes), `deep_loop_graph_status` (grouped counts and signal values), and `deep_loop_graph_convergence` (blockers and typed decision traces).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6580:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2772:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:55:Both deep-loop agent prompts now emit structured graph events (research: question, finding, claim, source; review: dimension, file, finding, evidence, remediation). Contract docs define the `graphEvents` JSONL format and graph-aware convergence model for each loop.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6581:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2773:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:63:Implementation proceeded through 5 sub-phases: extract graph primitives, build coverage graph database, add MCP tools, define reducer/MCP contract and integrate reducer, and agent/convergence integration. 25 files were touched (17 new), adding approximately 5,200 lines. 101 tests cover edge management, signals, graph-aware convergence, MCP DB behavior, and tool integration.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6582:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2774:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:73:| Reuse-first extraction from existing graph modules | Avoids greenfield duplication while acknowledging that reducer/convergence work is not plug-and-play |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6583:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2776:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:76:| Explicit reducer/MCP contract with latency budget | Prevents silent timeouts from degrading convergence decisions |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6584:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2777:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:78:| Coverage-specific weight calibration | Inherited memory weights replaced by coverage-aware values before convergence is finalized |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6585:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2778:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:88:| Edge management, signals, and convergence unit tests | PASS (101 tests) |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6586:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2779:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/implementation-summary.md:89:| MCP DB schema behavior and upsert/query/status/convergence tools | PASS |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6587:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2781:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:3:description: "Define the coverage-graph substrate for deep research and deep review by extracting reusable graph primitives from the Spec Kit Memory MCP server and applying them to deep-loop convergence."
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6588:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2783:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:8:  - "deep_loop_graph_convergence"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6589:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2784:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:22:Phase 002 turns semantic convergence from an abstract idea into a concrete implementation plan. The coverage graph is the fourth graph system in the existing Spec Kit Memory stack, following the causal graph, the code structural graph, and the graph-signal layer already present under `.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6590:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2785:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:24:The design target is explicit reuse, not greenfield invention. Research findings revise the reuse estimate to roughly 35-45% direct reuse, 25-30% adapted reuse, and the remainder genuinely new loop semantics. Edge management from `causal-edges.ts`, degree/depth metrics from `graph-signals.ts`, contradiction-reporting patterns from `contradiction-detection.ts`, and SQLite setup patterns from `code-graph-db.ts` transfer well, but contradiction adjudication, convergence design, and reducer/MCP integration are not plug-and-play. Phase 001 remains the legal stop-decision foundation. Phase 002 adds graph context so low novelty only permits STOP when coverage, verification, and contradiction state agree.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6591:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2787:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:41:| **Handoff Criteria** | Phase 003 can consume graph-backed coverage, contradiction, provenance, and convergence signals without introducing a second graph model. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6592:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2788:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:47:**Role in Packet 042**: Phase 001 established legal stop reasons, typed convergence traces, and reducer ownership. Phase 002 adds the semantic substrate needed to explain whether the loop has actually covered the problem space. Phase 003 depends on this phase to drive wave and segment decisions. Phase 004 depends on the persisted graph and snapshots for offline optimization and replay analysis.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6593:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2789:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:55:- Shared coverage-graph CommonJS helpers for edge management, signals, contradictions, and convergence.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6594:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2790:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:57:- Four new `deep_loop_graph_*` MCP tools on the existing Spec Kit Memory MCP server: `upsert`, `query`, `status`, and `convergence`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6595:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2791:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:58:- Reducer integration that defines the reducer/MCP seam explicitly, writes graph deltas after each iteration, and queries graph-aware convergence.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6596:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2793:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:80:Define an implementation-ready semantic coverage graph that reuses existing graph infrastructure, persists loop-scoped graph state in `deep-loop-graph.sqlite`, and feeds graph-backed convergence into the existing Phase 001 stop-decision logic without replacing `newInfoRatio` or other established runtime-truth signals.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6597:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2794:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:91:- Define research and review graph ontologies, including node kinds, relation types, initial weight estimates, metadata contracts, and convergence metrics.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6598:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2796:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:95:- Modify the deep-research reducer so it consumes iteration `graphEvents`, defines the reducer/MCP contract explicitly, upserts graph state, queries graph convergence, and falls back to a local JSON graph file when MCP is unavailable.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6599:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2797:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:96:- Update the deep-research and deep-review reference docs and agent prompts so iterations emit graph events and use graph-aware convergence language.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6600:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2798:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:97:- Add the listed unit and integration tests for graph core logic, signals, convergence, DB behavior, and tool behavior.

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6602:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2803:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:128:| `.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/handlers/coverage-graph/convergence.ts` | Create | Handler for typed graph-aware convergence assessment and blocker reporting. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6603:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2804:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:135:| `.opencode/skills/sk-deep-research/scripts/reduce-state.cjs` | Modify | Ingest iteration `graphEvents`, define the reducer/MCP contract, push graph deltas to MCP, query convergence, enforce the fallback authority chain, and keep a local JSON fallback path. |

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6606:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2807:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:149:| `.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/tests/coverage-graph-convergence.vitest.ts` | Create | Verify research/review convergence signals and typed STOP decisions. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6607:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2808:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:155:Research findings revise the original reuse estimate downward: Phase 002 is now planned as 35-45% direct reuse, 25-30% adapted reuse, and the remainder genuinely new loop semantics. Direct reuse is concentrated in graph primitives and DB lifecycle patterns; adapted work is concentrated in contradiction handling, convergence design, and reducer/MCP integration.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6608:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2809:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:166:The weights below are initial estimates inherited from memory-causal graph heuristics. They are implementation starting points, not final truth constants, and MUST be recalibrated for coverage semantics before convergence thresholds are considered stable.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6609:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2810:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:180:These review weights are also initial estimates inherited from memory-causal graph behavior. Implementation MUST validate whether they should influence traversal only, convergence scoring, or both, and recalibrate them accordingly.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6610:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2820:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:290:| `deep_loop_graph_convergence` | Composite convergence assessment | Return `decision`, `signals`, `blockers`, and a typed `trace` explaining STOP legality |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6611:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2821:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:292:Standalone visualization is explicitly deferred to a later phase. Phase 002 only requires the four reducer-facing MCP tools above; dashboards can render summaries from status/convergence outputs and the local derived graph state.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6612:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2824:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:326:4. Reducer calls `deep_loop_graph_convergence`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6613:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2825:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:328:6. Dashboard/synthesis surfaces consume status/convergence summaries plus locally derived graph context.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6614:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2829:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:345:| REQ-005 | The Spec Kit Memory MCP server MUST expose the four `deep_loop_graph_*` tools with the contracts defined in this phase. | `upsert`, `query`, `status`, and `convergence` are all represented in handler scope and `tool-schemas.ts`; query types and output shapes are explicit; visualization is explicitly deferred. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6615:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2830:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:346:| REQ-006 | Graph convergence MUST contextualize Phase 001 stop logic without replacing `newInfoRatio`. | The phase explicitly states that low novelty plus strong coverage can allow legal STOP, while low novelty plus uncovered questions, unresolved contradictions, or failed coverage guards (`sourceDiversity`, `evidenceDepth`) must block legal STOP. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6616:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2831:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:352:| REQ-007 | The deep-research reducer MUST ingest `graphEvents`, persist them, and query graph convergence after each iteration. | `reduce-state.cjs` is named in scope; reducer flow is documented step by step; fallback behavior is defined for MCP-unavailable runs. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6617:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2832:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:353:| REQ-008 | Deep-research and deep-review state/convergence references and agents MUST emit graph-native artifacts. | Both state-format reference files document `graphEvents`; both convergence reference files explain graph-aware signals; both agent files instruct iterations to emit graph nodes and edges. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6618:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2833:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:354:| REQ-009 | The phase MUST add the listed verification files for shared graph logic and MCP behavior. | `coverage-graph-core.vitest.ts`, `coverage-graph-signals.vitest.ts`, `coverage-graph-convergence.vitest.ts`, `coverage-graph-db.vitest.ts`, and `coverage-graph-tools.vitest.ts` all appear in scope and tasks with clear verification targets. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6619:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2835:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:365:- **SC-003**: Research and review graph ontologies are fully specified, including kinds, relations, initial weight estimates, metadata, convergence metrics, and the requirement to calibrate weights during implementation.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6620:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2836:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:367:- **SC-005**: The reducer integration path explains the reducer/MCP contract, when graph upsert happens, when convergence is queried, and how fallback authority works.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6621:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2837:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:369:- **SC-007**: Graph-aware convergence is explicitly additive to Phase 001 runtime truth rather than a competing decision channel.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6622:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2838:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:374:1. **Given** a research packet with low novelty and high question coverage, **when** `deep_loop_graph_convergence` runs, **then** it can support legal STOP only if claims are verified and contradictions are within tolerance.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6623:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2839:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:375:2. **Given** a research packet with low novelty but uncovered questions, **when** convergence is evaluated, **then** the decision must be `STOP_BLOCKED` and the blockers must name the uncovered questions.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6624:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2840:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/002-semantic-coverage-graph/spec.md:376:3. **Given** a review packet with unresolved contradictory findings, **when** convergence is evaluated, **then** legal STOP is blocked even if iteration novelty has fallen.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6625:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2847:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:35:Deep research and deep review can now handle very large targets through orchestrator-managed parallel wave execution without abandoning the LEAF-worker model. The implementation adds deterministic segmentation, packet-local coordination, segment-level convergence, and auditable merge behavior on top of the Phase 002 coverage-graph foundation.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6626:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2850:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:47:The v2 graph-enhanced segmentation wraps Phase 002 graph signals for per-segment convergence, pruning, and promotion decisions. The shared wave lifecycle manager handles fan-out, join, prune, promote, and merge transitions. The reducer-owned `board.json` tracks conflicts, dedupe, and promoted findings, while `dashboard.md` is derived and never directly maintained.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6627:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2858:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/implementation-summary.md:101:1. **V2 graph-enhanced segmentation depends on Phase 002 graph readiness.** If graph convergence signals are unavailable, segmentation falls back to v1 heuristic mode.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6628:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2862:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:45:- [x] Phase 002 graph convergence is identified as the convergence authority for segments.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6629:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2869:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:76:- **Wave convergence layer**: wraps Phase 002 graph signals for per-segment decisions.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6630:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2870:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:77:- **Coordination board**: keeps `board.json` as the canonical execution ledger and `dashboard.md` as a derived human-readable render.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6631:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2874:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:90:  -> evaluate each segment with graph-backed convergence
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6632:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2885:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:155:- `.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/lib/wave-convergence.cjs`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6633:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2895:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:206:| Unit | Segment planner, board helpers, convergence wrappers, keyed merge helpers | Vitest |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6634:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2897:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:220:| Phase 002 graph tools and convergence surfaces | Internal | Yellow | Phase 3b graph-enhanced segmentation and graph-backed pruning would be blocked. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6635:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2898:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/plan.md:221:| Phase 001 resume and journal model | Internal | Green | Segment-level recovery would become inconsistent with existing runtime truth. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6636:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2909:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:22:Phase 003 adds orchestrator-managed parallel wave execution so deep research and deep review can handle very large targets without abandoning the LEAF-worker model. It formalizes deterministic segmentation, packet-local coordination, segment-level convergence, and auditable merge behavior on top of the coverage-graph foundation from Phase 002.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6637:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2914:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:49:- Phase 002 graph tools, especially graph-backed convergence and gap detection.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6638:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2915:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:50:- Phase 001 stop reasons, journals, resume semantics, and reducer-owned sections.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6639:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2919:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:59:- Reducer-owned `board.json` execution ledger plus derived human-readable `dashboard.md` render.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6640:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2921:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:75:Define an orchestrator-layer wave execution model that segments large review and research targets into bounded parallel batches, tracks each segment through convergence and promotion, and merges the results back into one auditable packet without changing the LEAF-worker rule.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6641:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2925:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:89:- Introduce machine-first, reducer-owned packet-local coordination tracking with `board.json` as the canonical execution ledger and `dashboard.md` as a derived human-readable render.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6642:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2928:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:92:- Apply Phase 002 graph convergence per segment so pruning and promotion decisions are evidence-backed.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6643:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2935:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:110:| `.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/lib/wave-coordination-board.cjs` | Create | Reducer-owned `board.json` execution-ledger schema, status transitions, conflict tracking, and derived dashboard renderer helpers. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6644:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2937:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:112:| `.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/lib/wave-convergence.cjs` | Create | Segment-level convergence helpers that wrap Phase 002 graph metrics and stop traces. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6645:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2939:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:114:| `.opencode/skills/sk-deep-research/references/state_format.md` | Modify | Add `domain-ledger.json`, segment JSONL, `board.json`, derived dashboard, and keyed merge contracts. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6646:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2956:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:146:| REQ-003 | The phase MUST define a packet-local coordination board that is reducer-owned and machine-first. | `board.json` is the canonical execution ledger for per-segment state, conflict notes, deduplication markers, and promotion outcomes; `dashboard.md` is a derived human-readable render and not a human-edited strategy surface. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6647:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2958:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/003-wave-executor/spec.md:153:| REQ-005 | Each segment MUST use Phase 002 graph signals independently for convergence, pruning, promotion, and v2 decomposition upgrades. | Segment convergence explicitly references coverage-graph status or convergence outputs; prune logic can retire converged or stuck segments without dropping unresolved global gaps silently; graph-enhanced segmentation is blocked until the Phase 002 coverage graph is operational. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6648:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2977:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/plan.md:76:- **Replay runner**: re-evaluates reducer and convergence logic under alternate candidates.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6649:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2989:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/plan.md:135:- `.opencode/skills/sk-deep-research/references/convergence.md`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6650:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:2990:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/plan.md:136:- `.opencode/skills/sk-deep-review/references/convergence.md`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6651:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3003:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/plan.md:203:| Phase 002 graph metrics | Internal | Yellow | Optimizer would lose important semantic convergence signals. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6652:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3015:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/implementation-summary.md:39:The `040` replay corpus extractor harvests real traces from packet family `040` as the required corpus. Packet family `028` is supported as an optional compatibility-graded holdout. Packet family `042` is explicitly excluded until implementation traces exist. The corpus includes structured JSONL artifacts with iteration metadata, convergence signals, and stop decisions.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6653:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3016:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/implementation-summary.md:43:A multi-dimensional rubric scores convergence efficiency, recovery success rate, finding accuracy, and synthesis quality. Each dimension produces a normalized score that feeds into the search and promotion stages.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6654:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3041:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/spec.md:65:The deep-loop products now have richer runtime state, but tuning them is still largely manual: convergence thresholds, stuck detection, recovery escalation, and related numeric controls are adjusted by human judgment and one-off testing. That is expensive, hard to compare rigorously, and vulnerable to regressions because the system has no offline compile/evaluate loop that can replay historical traces, score outcomes, and prove that a new deterministic configuration is actually better before it is even considered for production.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6655:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3044:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/spec.md:80:- Define a rubric for finding accuracy, convergence efficiency, recovery success rate, and synthesis quality.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6656:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3045:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/spec.md:81:- Add configuration-search logic for deterministic numeric settings such as convergence thresholds, stuck detection, and recovery escalation.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6657:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3046:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/spec.md:82:- Add a deterministic replay runner for reducer and convergence logic under alternate configs.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6658:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3050:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/spec.md:101:| `.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/optimizer/rubric.cjs` | Create | Score runs across accuracy, convergence efficiency, recovery success, and synthesis quality. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6659:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3052:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/spec.md:103:| `.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/optimizer/replay-runner.cjs` | Create | Replay reducer and convergence logic against alternate configurations. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6660:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3057:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/spec.md:108:| `.opencode/skills/sk-deep-research/references/convergence.md` | Modify | Clarify which thresholds and recovery policies are optimizer-tunable. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6661:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3058:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/spec.md:109:| `.opencode/skills/sk-deep-review/references/convergence.md` | Modify | Clarify which thresholds and recovery policies are optimizer-tunable. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6662:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3066:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/spec.md:131:| REQ-003 | The optimizer MUST define a rubric that scores run quality across finding accuracy, convergence efficiency, recovery success rate, and synthesis quality. | The rubric exposes explicit metric definitions, weighting, and score outputs; the phase does not rely on one opaque "goodness" number. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6663:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3070:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/spec.md:140:| REQ-007 | Phase 4a search MUST stay within deterministic numeric config families such as convergence thresholds, stuck sensitivity, and recovery escalation. | Search configuration covers the allowed deterministic tunable dimensions, excludes locked contract fields, and records which candidates touched which parameter families. |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6664:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3078:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/004-offline-loop-optimizer/spec.md:166:4. **Given** a candidate config improves convergence efficiency but harms accuracy, **when** rubric scoring runs, **then** the breakdown shows the trade-off explicitly instead of hiding it.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6665:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3089:/bin/zsh -lc "printf '===== deep-research refs =====\\n'; for f in .opencode/skills/sk-deep-research/references/loop_protocol.md .opencode/skills/sk-deep-research/references/convergence.md .opencode/skills/sk-deep-research/references/state_format.md .opencode/skills/sk-deep-research/assets/deep_research_config.json .opencode/agents/deep-research.md; do echo \"--- "'$f ---"; rg -n "stop|reason|resume|journal|ledger|event|lifecycle|convergence|snapshot|replay|wave|parallel|optimizer|stability|coverage|inventory|question|blocked|synth|session" "$f" | head -n 120; echo; done' in /Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6748:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3350:215:In iteration file findings sections, annotate inline: `[Finding text] (sourceStrength: primary)`. In JSONL records, source strength is tracked implicitly through the `newInfoRatio` -- tentative findings contribute less to the ratio. The convergence algorithm excludes tentative-only findings when computing `entropyCoverage`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:6749:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/005-agent-improver-deep-loop-alignment/scratch/codex-gpt54-deep-research.md:3352:230:The `insight` status prevents premature convergence when a conceptually significant iteration would otherwise trigger the stuck counter. The `thought` status marks planning or meta-reasoning iterations that should not affect convergence signals.

.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/009-phase-parent-lean-trio-documentation/002-phase-parent-generator-pointer-polish/spec.md:17:    recent_action: "Authored spec.md for follow-on deferred items"
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/009-phase-parent-lean-trio-documentation/002-phase-parent-generator-pointer-polish/spec.md:54:Phase 001 shipped the lean-trio enforcement and documentation but deferred several additive items. Today, `/spec_kit:resume` on a phase parent walks the filesystem to list children — works correctly, but each resume pays the listing cost. `create.sh --phase` scaffolds the parent with level-N templates plus the phase-parent-section addendum — the resulting surface validates as a phase parent, but it carries vestigial heavy docs that the new lean template would skip entirely. There is no automated check warning a reviewer when a phase-parent `spec.md` slips into merge/migration narrative. And no end-to-end walkthrough exists to confirm the round trip from `/spec_kit:plan :with-phases` through `/spec_kit:resume`.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/009-phase-parent-lean-trio-documentation/002-phase-parent-generator-pointer-polish/spec.md:57:Close the deferred items so the phase-parent surface is uniformly lean by default, resume is fastest-path, and reviewers get automated guardrails on content discipline. Each item is additive: schema already accepts the pointer fields, template already exists, validator framework already exposes the rule registry — this packet wires them up.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/z_archive/023-hybrid-rag-fusion-refinement/011-indexing-and-adaptive-fusion/spec.md:148:- **Parent packet metadata**: See `description.json` and `graph-metadata.json` for save lineage and active-child pointers.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/009-phase-parent-lean-trio-documentation/002-phase-parent-generator-pointer-polish/plan.md:4:description: "Three-phase rollout (Generator+Bubble, Create+Templates, Resume+Validator+E2E) of the deferred phase-parent items."
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/009-phase-parent-lean-trio-documentation/002-phase-parent-generator-pointer-polish/plan.md:42:Three sequential sub-phases land the deferred work additively. Sub-phase A wires the generator pointer-write + bubble-up branch (read `isPhaseParent`, atomic JSON update). Sub-phase B swaps `create.sh --phase` to the lean template and lands the supporting `templates/context-index.md` + `resource-map.md` polish. Sub-phase C wires the resume redirect, hook brief, content validator (P2), and end-to-end manual test. Each sub-phase ships independently; the critical path is A → C (resume needs pointer to demonstrate redirect).

.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/006-research/003-system-bug-improvement-research/plan.md:88:  reducer aggregates state, dashboard updates, convergence checked
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/006-research/003-system-bug-improvement-research/checklist.md:78:- [x] CHK-030 [P0] Read-only research; no product code modified [EVIDENCE: charter explicitly says implementation deferred]
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/009-phase-parent-lean-trio-documentation/001-phase-parent-validator-docs/spec.md:63:When a spec folder has phase children (e.g. `026/{005-code-graph,006-skill-advisor,...}/`), the parent currently authors a full Level 1/2/3 document set (`plan.md`, `tasks.md`, `checklist.md`, `decision-record.md`, `implementation-summary.md`) describing program-level intent. As phases execute, pivot, and converge over weeks, the parent docs drift from child reality. AI assistants reading the resume ladder treat the stale parent docs as authoritative, hallucinate current state, and propose work against outdated plans.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/009-phase-parent-lean-trio-documentation/001-phase-parent-validator-docs/spec.md:89:- Adding `check-phase-parent-content.sh` validator that scans parent spec.md for merge/migration narrative tokens — deferred to a follow-on packet (the template guidance is sufficient for the first ship).
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/009-phase-parent-lean-trio-documentation/001-phase-parent-validator-docs/checklist.md:48:- [ ] CHK-004 [P1] Tolerant migration policy explicitly chosen (Policy 1) over hard migration; soft-deprecation deferred to follow-on packet — evidence: `spec.md` ANCHOR:scope (Out of Scope) + ANCHOR:questions
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/006-research/003-system-bug-improvement-research/implementation-summary.md:78:| `research/deep-research-config.json` | Generated | Workflow config (cli-codex, gpt-5.5, high reasoning, 20 max iter, 0.01 convergence) |
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/006-research/003-system-bug-improvement-research/implementation-summary.md:97:The canonical `/deep:start-research-loop:auto` workflow was used. After the initial orchestrator agent's batch script (`run_all.sh`) failed on macOS bash 3.2 (`declare -A` not supported), the parent agent took over manual dispatch: each iteration was a separate `codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="high" --full-auto` call writing to `research/iterations/iteration-NNN.md` and `research/deltas/iter-NNN.jsonl`. Iterations 003-020 dispatched in batches of 3 in parallel; the JSONL state-log accumulated 20 iteration deltas. Synthesis used a final cli-codex high-reasoning call to produce `research.md` + `resource-map.md`.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/006-research/003-system-bug-improvement-research/implementation-summary.md:111:- **Packet 048** (iter-001 daemon concurrency fixes) — completed in parallel, commit `267b4d7a6`. All 4 iter-001 findings (F-001-A1-01..04) closed: watcher mutex, lifecycle shutdown ordering, generation lock token, cache invalidation monotonicity.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/006-research/003-system-bug-improvement-research/implementation-summary.md:112:- **Packet 047** (pre-existing test failures) — completed in parallel, commit `9f7c18936`. 5 unit tests fixed: 3 test corrections, 2 product-code completions of an in-progress snake_case rename.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/006-research/003-system-bug-improvement-research/implementation-summary.md:123:| 3-deep parallel queue | Each iteration is independent (different angle, different files); 3-deep balanced throughput vs codex API contention |
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/006-research/003-system-bug-improvement-research/implementation-summary.md:124:| No early stop on convergence | Convergence threshold 0.01 explicitly low; pre-defined 20 angles meant exhaustive sweep was the goal |
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/006-research/003-system-bug-improvement-research/implementation-summary.md:125:| Iter-001 findings remediated in parallel packet 048 | Concurrency bugs were actionable and self-contained; remediation didn't need to wait for synthesis |
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/006-research/003-system-bug-improvement-research/implementation-summary.md:155:3. **The synthesis is structural, not prescriptive.** Each finding has a one-line recommendation, but full design work (e.g., what the new boundary between `lib/freshness/` and `lib/derived/` should be) is deferred to remediation packets.

.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/006-research/003-system-bug-improvement-research/research/deep-research-strategy.md:76:Threshold: 0.01. Will run all 20 iterations unless findings cross multiple angles produce near-duplicate output, in which case convergence may fire early. Synthesis follows the loop with `research.md` (17-section format) and `resource-map.md`.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/028-documentation-alignment-readme-fill-in/spec.md:87:Five doc-quality drift items have accumulated under `.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/`: (1) the `references/multi-ai-council/` directory has 6 files with inconsistent frontmatter (only 1 of 6 conforms to `skill_reference_template.md`); (2) two manifest maintainer docs (`templates/manifest/EXTENSION_GUIDE.md`, `MIGRATION.md`) lack reference frontmatter entirely; (3) `shared/predicates/` (560 LOC, 1 source + tests) has no folder README despite all 9 sibling directories under `shared/` having one; (4) `mcp_server/code_graph/lib/utils/` (64 LOC) has no folder README; (5) `mcp_server/skill_advisor/` carries two parallel manual-testing surfaces — `operator_runbook/` (43 scenarios, full subsystem coverage) and `manual_testing_playbook/` (4 scenarios, narrow critical path) — whose existence in parallel violates the sk-doc single-source-of-truth contract. Each item is small in isolation, but together they erode template adherence and make sk-doc governance harder to enforce.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/028-documentation-alignment-readme-fill-in/spec.md:172:| Risk | cli-codex parallelism corrupts shared files | High | Cap parallel WBs at 3; ensure WB-1..WB-4 touch disjoint trees (verified); WB-5 runs solo |
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/017-hook-test-sandbox-fix/spec.md:188:No blocking questions remain. The deferred live verdict belongs to an operator
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/009-phase-parent-lean-trio-documentation/001-phase-parent-validator-docs/implementation-summary.md:67:`check-graph-metadata.sh` now accepts optional `derived.last_active_child_id` (string|null) and `derived.last_active_at` (string|null) without requiring them. Existing 026 graph-metadata still passes. The fields are reserved for the deferred pointer-write optimization (see Known Limitations).
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/009-phase-parent-lean-trio-documentation/001-phase-parent-validator-docs/implementation-summary.md:133:1. **Pointer-write generator branch deferred (T012-T014).** `generate-context.ts` does not yet write `derived.last_active_child_id` or `derived.last_active_at` to a phase parent's `graph-metadata.json` on save. Schema accepts the fields; resume already handles phase parents via filesystem listing (per `resume.md` step 3b). Adding the pointer is a follow-on optimization that lets resume skip the listing step and recurse straight into the most recent active child.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/009-phase-parent-lean-trio-documentation/001-phase-parent-validator-docs/implementation-summary.md:135:2. **`create.sh --phase` parent template selection deferred (T015).** The current `--phase` mode scaffolds the parent from the level-N templates plus `addendum/phase/phase-parent-section.md`. The new validator phase-parent branch tolerates that output (lean trio is satisfied; addendum heavy docs are tolerated). A follow-on packet can swap to `templates/phase_parent/spec.md` for an even leaner default.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/009-phase-parent-lean-trio-documentation/001-phase-parent-validator-docs/implementation-summary.md:141:5. **End-to-end `/spec_kit:plan :with-phases --phases 2` walkthrough deferred (T028).** Acceptance scenarios from `plan.md` ANCHOR:testing are covered by fixture parity tests + 026 regression rather than a full plan-implement-resume round trip.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/003-cross-cutting-cleanup-pass/009-phase-parent-lean-trio-documentation/001-phase-parent-validator-docs/implementation-summary.md:143:6. **Hook brief explicit phase-parent redirect deferred (T020).** Startup brief reads spec docs structurally; without the parent's heavy docs (no longer required), the brief naturally returns fewer-but-truer signals. An explicit "phase parent — pick a child" hint in the brief is polish.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/z_archive/023-hybrid-rag-fusion-refinement/011-indexing-and-adaptive-fusion/006-default-on-boost-rollout/implementation-summary.md:56:`buildDeepQueryVariants` called `isExpansionActive(query)` which returned false for "simple" queries (classified by R15 complexity router). This caused the function to return only the original query, so the `queryVariants.length > 1` guard failed and the parallel multi-search branch never executed. Fix: removed the `isExpansionActive` gate (since the function is only called from deep mode context) and added a fallback reformulation (reverse word order for multi-word queries, "about X" prefix for single words) to ensure at least 2 variants are always generated.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/z_archive/023-hybrid-rag-fusion-refinement/011-indexing-and-adaptive-fusion/006-default-on-boost-rollout/implementation-summary.md:134:2. **Feature catalog not updated (T016 deferred).** P1 item. The env var documentation in config files and JSDoc comments serve as primary documentation.

.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/006-research/003-system-bug-improvement-research/research/iterations/iteration-010.md:20:| F-010-B5-03 | P1 | `.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:812-814` | `step_evaluate_results` in deep-review auto has the same malformed fallback path. The fallback record uses `run` and omits required fields such as `iteration`, `sessionId`, `generation`, `lineageMode`, and `durationMs`, even though `post_dispatch_validate` requires them at lines 764-771. `step_read_state` counts `type === "iteration"` at lines 375-376, so an invalid recovery record can advance the loop and pollute convergence metrics. | Align the fallback record with the review iteration schema, including `iteration`, lineage fields, and duration, or use a non-iteration failure event that the loop does not count as completed work. |

A live GitHub PAT remains unrotated in `.env:12` despite being flagged in iter-002 and multiple review iterations. No active Mini Shai-Hulud compromise exists. Dimension converges on "indicator gap, no active threat" — the PAT rotation remains the only unresolved HIGH finding requiring manual user action.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/006-research/001-automation-self-management-research/plan.md:72:- **Iteration files**: One markdown file per pass, each with focus, sources, findings, adversarial checks where required, and convergence signal.
.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/000-release-and-program-cleanup/006-research/001-automation-self-management-research/plan.md:73:- **Delta JSONL files**: One metric row per pass for convergence accounting.
