 succeeded in 0ms:

## .opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml
   105	  lock_file: "{artifact_dir}/.deep-research.lock"
   106	  prompt_dir: "{artifact_dir}/prompts"
   107	  iteration_dir: "{artifact_dir}/iterations"
   108	  iteration_pattern: "{artifact_dir}/iterations/iteration-{NNN}.md"
   109	  # Per-iteration structured delta stream (one file per iteration) — complement to the
   110	  # canonical state_log append. The delta file MUST contain at least one record whose
   111	  # `type === "iteration"` so the reducer can rehydrate iteration state after a partial
   112	  # run. Variants like `"iteration_delta"` are silently dropped by the reducer; the
   113	  # post_dispatch_validate step enforces the canonical type below.
   114	  delta_dir: "{artifact_dir}/deltas"
   115	  delta_pattern: "{artifact_dir}/deltas/iter-{NNN}.jsonl"
   116	  research_output: "{artifact_dir}/research.md"
   117	  resource_map_output: "{artifact_dir}/resource-map.md"
   118	  archive_root: "{artifact_archive_root}"
   119	  synthesis_snapshot_pattern: "{artifact_dir}/synthesis-v{generation}.md"
   120	
   121	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   122	# WORKFLOW
   123	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   124	workflow:
   125	
   126	  step_resolve_artifact_root:
   127	    description: "Resolve artifact directory — use fan-out lineage override when provided, else resolve from spec_folder"
   128	    note: "Root specs keep research artifacts directly in {spec_folder}/research/. Child phases and sub-phases keep local packet directories in {spec_folder}/research/{packet}/, and archives stay local at {spec_folder}/research_archive/{packet}/."
   129	    branch_on: "config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir"
   130	    if_present:
   131	      bind:
   132	        artifact_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
   133	        artifact_root_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
   134	        artifact_subfolder: null
   135	        artifact_archive_root: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}/_archive"
   136	    if_absent:
   137	      command: "node -e \"const { resolveArtifactRoot } = require('.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/shared/review-research-paths.cjs'); console.log(JSON.stringify(resolveArtifactRoot('{spec_folder}', 'research')));\""
   138	      outputs:
   139	        - artifact_root_dir: "Resolved local research owner directory"
   140	        - artifact_subfolder: "Local packet subfolder ({ownerSlug}-pt-{NN}), else null"
   141	        - artifact_dir: "Resolved research packet directory for this target"
   142	        - artifact_archive_root: "Resolved local research archive directory for this target"
   143	
   144	  step_fanout_spawn:
   145	    description: "Spawn fan-out lineages; skip and proceed to phase_init normally when single-executor"
   146	    skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
   147	    instructions: |
   148	      Fan-out mode is active. Spawn all lineages. Each lineage runs the full loop in its own
   149	      isolated sub-packet under {artifact_dir}/lineages/{label}/.
   150	      After all lineages complete, jump directly to phase_synthesis — skip phase_init and
   151	      phase_main_loop entirely (those are the single-executor path). The merge step in
   152	      phase_synthesis will consolidate results across all lineages.
   153	    sub_steps:
   154	      step_fanout_spawn_cli:
   155	        description: "Spawn all CLI lineages in capped worker pool"
   156	        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind != 'native'"
   157	        command: |
   158	          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-run.cjs \
   159	            --spec-folder {spec_folder} \
   160	            --loop-type research \
   161	            --fanout-config-json '{config.fanout_json}' \
   162	            --base-artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
   163	        working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   164	        wait_for_completion: true
   165	      step_fanout_spawn_native:
   166	        description: "Dispatch each native lineage as a sequential deep-research sub-agent"
   167	        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind == 'native'"
   168	        for_each: "lineage in expanded native entries of config.fanout"
   169	        dispatch:
   170	          agent: deep-research
   171	          model: opus
   172	          context: |
   173	            Execute the deep-research loop with these parameters:
   174	              spec_folder: {spec_folder}
   175	              config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir: {artifact_dir}/lineages/{lineage.label}
   176	              session_id: fanout-{lineage.label}-{fanout_run_id}
   177	              executor: native
   178	            Run to convergence. Write all outputs to the override directory.
   179	        wait_for_completion: true
   180	
   835	            agent_config_recipe: |
   836	              The research-iter recipe at .opencode/skills/cli-devin/assets/agent-config-deep-research-iter.json
   837	              ships with literal "<repo-root>" and "<packet-root>" placeholders. The command block substitutes them
   838	              via sed at dispatch time and writes the result to {state_paths.prompt_dir}/agent-config-iter-NNN.json,
   839	              then passes that path to devin --agent-config. The recipe pins allowed_tools (Read+Grep+Glob+Bash)
   840	              and permissions.allow/deny scope expressions (Read(/path/**), Exec(<cmd>)) at Devin's strict parser.
   841	              The narrow Write scope (v1.0.4.0) is anchored at <packet-root> = {spec_folder} so iterations may only
   842	              persist artifacts inside the current packet directory.
   843	              Contract: .opencode/skills/cli-devin/references/deep-loop-iter-contract.md.
   844	              Recipe authoring: .opencode/skills/cli-devin/references/agent-config-recipes.md.
   845	          notes:
   846	            - "devin --prompt-file accepts a path to the rendered iteration prompt (the SKILL.md skill_reference dispatch shape)"
   847	            - "Supported models: swe-1.6 (default), deepseek-v4, glm-5.1, kimi-k2.6 (per DEVIN_SUPPORTED_MODELS in executor-config.ts)"
   848	            - "--permission-mode auto auto-approves read-only ops and prompts on write; dangerous auto-approves all (only for sandboxed runs)"
   849	            - "--agent-config pins the research-iter profile (read-only tool allowlist + Exec scope expressions) at Devin's strict parser. The recipe at cli-devin/assets/agent-config-deep-research-iter.json is substituted via sed at dispatch time to resolve the <repo-root> and <packet-root> placeholders per the recipe authoring contract."
   850	            - "cli-devin self-invocation guard: this branch must only run from a non-Devin dispatch surface (Claude/Codex/Gemini/OpenCode/raw shell). The cli-devin skill SKILL.md §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate."
   851	            - "</dev/null required: family convention for non-interactive dispatch to avoid stdin-blocking edge cases across CLI versions"
   852	            - "Cloud handoff is NOT used here — each iteration runs locally with convergence detection. See cli-devin references/cloud_handoff.md for the separate cloud-handoff route."
   853	            - "Reasoning effort is NOT exposed by Devin's CLI surface; reasoning depth is fixed per model (e.g., swe-1.6 vs deepseek-v4). serviceTier is also N/A."
   854	            - "v1.0.4.0: dispatch wrapped in gtimeout 900 (15 min cap per iter) to prevent silent hangs; exit code 124 is gtimeout's signal and surfaces as ITER_OUTCOME=timeout on stderr"
   855	            - "v1.0.4.0: stderr captured to {state_paths.prompt_dir}/devin-stderr-iter-NNN.log and scanned for 'A tool was rejected by the user' (Devin runtime approval gate firing inside --permission-mode auto); ITER_OUTCOME=tool_rejected flagged so the post_dispatch_validate / reducer can skip the iter cleanly without inheriting a stuck-style failure"
   856	            - "v1.0.4.0: stdout captured to {state_paths.prompt_dir}/devin-stdout-iter-NNN.log and scanned for stdout-fallback boilerplate ('I cannot write', 'read-only mode', 'permission errors when attempting to write'); ITER_OUTCOME=degraded_stdout_fallback flagged so the JSONL row can be tagged dispatch_quality=degraded for the synthesis phase"
   857	            - "v1.0.4.0: <packet-root> substitution added to the agent-config sed pipeline so the research-iter recipe's narrow Write scope resolves to {spec_folder} at dispatch time"
   858	        post_dispatch_validate:
   859	          validator: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/post-dispatch-validate.ts#validateIterationOutputs"
   860	          assert_exists: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
   861	          assert_appended: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   862	          assert_jsonl_fields: [type, iteration, newInfoRatio, status, focus]
   863	          assert_canonical_type: "iteration"
   864	          assert_delta_file_exists: "{state_paths.delta_pattern}"
   865	          assert_delta_file_has_iteration_record: true
   866	          on_failure:
   867	            action: "emit schema_mismatch canonical conflict event"
   868	            escalation: "After 3 consecutive failures, trigger stuck_recovery event with diagnostic context"
   869	          failure_reasons_reference:
   870	            - "iteration_file_missing — iteration narrative markdown not written"
   871	            - "iteration_file_empty — iteration narrative markdown is zero bytes"
   872	            - "jsonl_not_appended — state log file did not grow since pre-dispatch snapshot"
   873	            - "jsonl_missing_fields — last state-log record omits required schema fields"
   874	            - "jsonl_parse_error — last state-log line is not valid JSON"
   875	            - "jsonl_wrong_type — last state-log record uses type!='iteration' (e.g. 'iteration_delta'); reducer will silently drop"
   876	            - "delta_file_missing — per-iteration deltas/iter-NNN.jsonl not written"
   877	            - "delta_file_empty — per-iteration delta file exists but has zero bytes"
   878	            - "delta_file_missing_iteration_record — delta file lacks any record with type='iteration'"
   879	            - "executor_missing — non-native executor did not record provenance"
   880	            - "dispatch_failure_logged — last record is an explicit dispatch_failure event"
   881	
   882	      step_reduce_state:
   883	        action: "Run the reducer to synchronize registry, dashboard, and strategy"
   884	        command: "node .opencode/skills/deep-research/scripts/reduce-state.cjs {spec_folder}"
   885	        inputs:
   886	          latestJSONLDelta: "Latest JSONL records written since the previous iteration"
   887	          newIterationFile: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
   888	          priorReducedState: "{state_paths.registry}"
   889	        outputs:
   890	          - "{state_paths.registry}"
   891	          - "{state_paths.dashboard}"
   892	          - "{state_paths.strategy}"
   893	        failure_modes:
   894	          malformed_delta: "skip + warn"
   895	          missing_iteration_file: "no-op + error"
   896	          schema_mismatch: "reject + conflict event"
   897	        guarantee: "Idempotent for identical inputs"
   898	
   899	      step_graph_upsert:
   900	        action: "Persist the latest iteration graph delta after the reducer refresh and after the iteration file exists"
   901	        read:
   902	          - "{state_paths.state_log}"
   903	        extract:
   904	          - latest_graph_events: "Read graphEvents from the latest iteration record, else []"
   905	          - graph_upsert_nodes_json: "Map latest_graph_events where type == 'node' to node payloads with label -> name and preserve remaining node fields"
   906	          - graph_upsert_edges_json: "Map latest_graph_events where type == 'edge' to edge payloads with source -> sourceId, target -> targetId, relation -> uppercase(relation), and preserve remaining edge fields"
   907	          - graph_upsert_event_count: "Count mapped node and edge events"
   908	        if_graph_events_present:
   909	          bash: "node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/upsert.cjs --spec-folder \"{spec_folder}\" --loop-type \"research\" --session-id \"{config.lineage.sessionId}\" --nodes '{graph_upsert_nodes_json}' --edges '{graph_upsert_edges_json}'"
   910	          note: "Skip silently when graphEvents is missing or empty."
   911	        if_graph_events_missing:
   912	          proceed: true
   913	
   914	      step_evaluate_results:
   915	        action: "Verify iteration outputs and extract metrics"
   916	        verify:
   917	          - file_exists: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
   918	          - jsonl_appended: "New iteration record in state.jsonl"
   919	          - strategy_updated: "Reducer refreshed strategy machine-owned sections"
   920	          - registry_updated: "Reducer refreshed deep-research-findings-registry.json"
   921	        extract:
   922	          - newInfoRatio: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
   923	          - findings_count: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
   924	          - status: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
   925	          - latest_focus: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
   926	        on_missing_outputs:
   927	          action: "Mark iteration as 'error', continue to next"
   928	          # <!-- F-010-B5-02 -->
   929	          # Canonical iteration record: include mode, sessionId, generation, durationMs, keyQuestions, answeredQuestions
   930	          # so the reducer can persist the failure without dropping the iteration. Schema source: state_format.md §Iteration Records.
   931	          append_jsonl: '{"type":"iteration","run":{current_iteration},"mode":"research","status":"error","focus":"{next_focus}","findingsCount":0,"newInfoRatio":0.0,"keyQuestions":[],"answeredQuestions":[],"durationMs":0,"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{config.lineage.sessionId}","generation":{config.lineage.generation}}'
   932	
   933	      step_generate_dashboard:
   934	        action: "Generate or refresh the human-readable dashboard"
   935	        read:
   936	          - "{state_paths.state_log}"
   937	          - "{state_paths.registry}"
   938	          - "{state_paths.strategy}"
   939	        template: .opencode/skills/deep-research/assets/deep_research_dashboard.md
   940	        output: "{state_paths.dashboard}"
   941	        note: "Auto-generated from JSONL + reducer registry + strategy. Never manually edited."
   942	
   943	      step_update_tracking:
   944	        action: "Update loop tracking variables"
   945	        set:
   946	          current_iteration: "{current_iteration + 1}"
   947	          stuck_count: "if status == 'thought': unchanged (skip). if status == 'insight': 0 (reset). if newInfoRatio < convergence_threshold: stuck_count + 1, else: 0"
   948	        log: "Iteration {N} complete. newInfoRatio: {newInfoRatio}. Findings: {findings_count}. Stuck count: {stuck_count}."
   949	
   950	      step_loop_decision:
   951	        action: "Return to step_read_state for next iteration"
   952	        goto: step_read_state
   953	
   954	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   955	  # PHASE 3: SYNTHESIS
   956	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   957	  phase_synthesis:
   958	    purpose: Compile all iteration findings into final research/research.md
   959	    steps:
   960	
   961	      step_fanout_merge:
   962	        description: "Merge N lineage registries into one consolidated registry; skip when single-executor"
   963	        skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
   964	        command: |
   965	          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-merge.cjs \
   966	            --loop-type research \
   967	            --artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
   968	        working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   969	        wait_for_completion: true
   970	
   971	      step_hydrate_summary_metrics:
   972	        action: "Hydrate summary metrics before synthesis"
   973	        read:
   974	          - "{state_paths.config}"
   975	          - "{state_paths.state_log}"
  1155	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1156	reference_only_appendix:
  1157	  checkpoint_commit:
  1158	    note: "Checkpoint commits are intentionally excluded from workflow.steps."
  1159	    commands:
  1160	      - "git add {state_paths.iteration_pattern} {state_paths.state_log} {state_paths.strategy} {state_paths.research_output}"
  1161	      - 'git commit -m "chore(deep-research): iteration {NNN} complete"'
  1162	  wave_orchestration:
  1163	    note: "Wave execution is intentionally excluded from workflow.steps."
  1164	    summary:
  1165	      - "Check whether 3+ independent unanswered questions justify a wave."
  1166	      - "Dispatch up to 3 parallel agents on distinct questions."
  1167	      - "Score wave results by median newInfoRatio and promote top branches."

## .opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml
   105	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   106	# WORKFLOW
   107	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   108	workflow:
   109	
   110	  step_resolve_artifact_root:
   111	    description: "Resolve artifact directory — use fan-out lineage override when provided, else resolve from spec_folder"
   112	    note: "Root specs keep research artifacts directly in {spec_folder}/research/. Child phases and sub-phases keep local packet directories in {spec_folder}/research/{packet}/, and archives stay local at {spec_folder}/research_archive/{packet}/."
   113	    branch_on: "config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir"
   114	    if_present:

   117	        artifact_root_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
   118	        artifact_subfolder: null

   120	    if_absent:

   122	      outputs:
   123	        - artifact_root_dir: "Resolved local research owner directory"
   124	        - artifact_subfolder: "Local packet subfolder ({ownerSlug}-pt-{NN}), else null"
   125	        - artifact_dir: "Resolved research packet directory for this target"
   126	        - artifact_archive_root: "Resolved local research archive directory for this target"
   127	
   128	  step_fanout_spawn:
   129	    description: "Spawn fan-out lineages; skip and proceed to phase_init normally when single-executor"
   130	    skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
   131	    instructions: |
   132	      Fan-out mode is active. Spawn all lineages. Each lineage runs the full loop in its own
   133	      isolated sub-packet under {artifact_dir}/lineages/{label}/.
   134	      After all lineages complete, jump directly to phase_synthesis — skip phase_init and
   135	      phase_main_loop entirely (those are the single-executor path). The merge step in
   136	      phase_synthesis will consolidate results across all lineages.
   137	    sub_steps:
   138	      step_fanout_spawn_cli:
   139	        description: "Spawn all CLI lineages in capped worker pool"
   140	        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind != 'native'"
   141	        command: |
   142	          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-run.cjs \
   143	            --spec-folder {spec_folder} \
   144	            --loop-type research \
   145	            --fanout-config-json '{config.fanout_json}' \
   146	            --base-artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
   147	        working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   148	        wait_for_completion: true
   149	      step_fanout_spawn_native:
   150	        description: "Dispatch each native lineage as a sequential deep-research sub-agent"
   151	        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind == 'native'"
   152	        for_each: "lineage in expanded native entries of config.fanout"
   153	        dispatch:

   164	
   165	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   166	  # PHASE 1: INITIALIZATION
   167	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   168	  phase_init:
   169	    purpose: Create all state files for the research session
   170	    steps:
   171	
   172	      step_preflight_contract:
   173	        action: "Validate required setup bindings and executable workflow contract before any file writes"
   174	        verify:
   175	          - required_values_present: [research_topic, spec_folder, max_iterations, convergence_threshold]
   176	          - spec_folder_is_within: "specs/ or .opencode/specs/ (canonicalize alias roots before validation)"
   177	          - unresolved_placeholders: "FAIL if any user-facing template references placeholders not produced by earlier steps"
   178	          - tool_contract: "FAIL if executable steps reference tools outside the command allowlist"
   179	        on_fail: "Halt with STATUS=FAIL and report the missing binding or unsupported contract reference"
   180	
   835	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   836	  # PHASE 3: SYNTHESIS
   837	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   838	  phase_synthesis:
   839	    purpose: Compile all iteration findings into final research/research.md
   840	    steps:
   841	
   842	      step_fanout_merge:
   843	        description: "Merge N lineage registries into one consolidated registry; skip when single-executor"
   844	        skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
   845	        command: |
   846	          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-merge.cjs \
   847	            --loop-type research \
   848	            --artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
   849	        working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   850	        wait_for_completion: true
   851	
   852	      step_hydrate_summary_metrics:
   853	        action: "Hydrate summary metrics before synthesis"
   854	        read:
   855	          - "{state_paths.config}"
   856	          - "{state_paths.state_log}"
   857	          - "{state_paths.registry}"
   858	          - "{state_paths.strategy}"
   859	        extract:
   860	          - iteration_count: "Count lines where type === 'iteration'"
   861	          - current_iteration: "iteration_count + 1"
   862	          - current_segment: "Latest segment_start event segment, else 1"
   863	          - last_focus: "Extract focus from latest iteration record, else 'none yet'"
   864	          - ratio_prev: "Extract newInfoRatio from second-latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
   865	          - ratio_latest: "Extract newInfoRatio from latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
   866	          - remaining_questions: "Count unchecked items in 'Key Questions'"
   867	          - remaining_questions_list: "List unchecked key questions from strategy.md"
   868	          - answered_count: "Count answered questions from strategy.md"
   869	          - total_questions: "Count total questions tracked in strategy.md"
   870	          - last_3_summaries: "Summarize the latest 3 iteration records as 'run N: focus (ratio)'"
   871	          - reason: "Use the latest synthesis/recovery stop reason if present, else the frozen default 'converged'. (Must be a member of the STOP_REASONS enum: converged, maxIterationsReached, blockedStop, stuckRecovery, error, manualStop, userPaused.)"
   872	
   873	      # ─── APPROVAL GATE: Pre-Synthesis ───
   874	      gate_pre_synthesis:
   875	        type: approval_gate
   876	        purpose: "Show loop summary and get approval to synthesize"
   877	        present: |
   878	          ## Research Loop Complete
   879	
   880	          **Total Iterations**: {iteration_count}
   881	          **Stop Reason**: {reason}
   882	          **Questions Answered**: {answered_count}/{total_questions}
   883	          **Recent Iteration Summary**: {last_3_summaries}
   884	
   885	          Review the iteration files in `{state_paths.iteration_dir}/` if you want more detail before synthesis.
   886	
   887	          Options:
   888	          A) Proceed to synthesis
   889	          B) Run more iterations (increase max)
   890	          C) Cancel (keep iteration files)
   891	        wait_for: "User response"
   892	        on_A: { proceed_to: step_read_all_iterations }
   893	        on_B: { action: "Increase max_iterations, return to loop", proceed_to: phase_loop }
   894	        on_C: { action: "Cancel synthesis, keep artifacts", status: "PARTIAL" }
   895	
   896	      step_read_all_iterations:
   897	        action: "Read all iteration files and strategy"
   898	        read_pattern: "{state_paths.iteration_dir}/iteration-*.md"
   899	        read_also: "{state_paths.strategy}"
   900	
   901	      step_emit_resource_map:
   902	        action: "Emit {state_paths.resource_map_output} from converged research deltas unless config.resource_map.emit is false"
   903	        command: "node .opencode/skills/deep-research/scripts/reduce-state.cjs {spec_folder} --emit-resource-map"
   904	        read:
   905	          - "{state_paths.config}"
   906	          - "{state_paths.delta_dir}/iter-*.jsonl"
   907	        write:
   908	          - "{state_paths.resource_map_output}"
   909	        guarantee: "Reducer skips cleanly when config.resource_map.emit == false and writes a deterministic resource-map when enabled."
   910	
   911	      step_compile_research:
   912	        action: "Compile or finalize research/research.md"
   913	        instructions: |
   914	          If research/research.md exists (progressive synthesis was active):
   915	            1. Read current research/research.md
   916	            2. Consolidate and deduplicate findings across all iterations
   917	            3. Fill any empty sections with findings from iteration files
   918	            4. Remove redundancy while preserving all unique findings
   919	            5. Add convergence report as appendix
   920	
   921	          If research/research.md does not exist:
   922	            1. Create research/research.md following 17-section template
   923	            2. Populate sections from iteration files
   924	            3. Add citations from original sources
   925	            4. Note unanswered questions in Open Questions section
   926	          Preserve machine-owned markers so the reducer-owned registry, dashboard, and strategy anchors can be refreshed on re-run without mutating prior synthesis. (Note: `completed-continue` lineage branch is deferred — see `deep-research/references/protocol/loop_protocol.md §Lifecycle Branch Contract`.)
   927	        output: "{state_paths.research_output}"
   928	
   929	      step_convergence_report:
   930	        action: "Generate and append convergence report"
   931	        report: |
   932	          ## Convergence Report
   933	          - Stop reason: {reason}
   934	          - Total iterations: {iteration_count}
   935	          - Questions answered: {answered_count} / {total_questions}
   936	          - Remaining questions: {remaining_questions}
   937	          - Last 3 iteration summaries: {last_3_summaries}
   938	          - Convergence threshold: {convergence_threshold}
   939	          - Segment transitions, wave scores, and checkpoint metrics are experimental and omitted from the live report.
   940	        append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"synthesis_complete","totalIterations":{iteration_count},"answeredCount":{answered_count},"totalQuestions":{total_questions},"stopReason":"{reason}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   941	
   942	      gate_post_synthesis_spec_writeback:
   943	        type: approval_gate
   944	        purpose: "Approve bounded spec.md write-back before memory-save review"
   945	        present: |
   946	          ## Post-Synthesis Spec Write-Back
   947	
   948	          **Source of truth**: `{state_paths.research_output}`
   949	          **Target**: `{spec_folder}/spec.md`
   950	          **Generated Fence**:
   951	          - `<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: deep-research/spec-findings -->`
   952	          - `<!-- END GENERATED: deep-research/spec-findings -->`
   953	
   954	          Planned action:
   955	          - replace exactly one generated findings block under the chosen host anchor
   956	          - fail closed on missing host anchor, duplicate markers, or human edits inside the machine-owned block
   957	
   958	          Options:
   959	          A) Approve write-back
   960	          B) Revise before write-back
   961	          C) Defer spec.md write-back
   962	        wait_for: "User response"
   963	        on_A: { proceed_to: step_writeback_spec_findings }
   964	        on_B: { action: "Adjust the synthesis or write-back inputs", return_to: gate_post_synthesis_spec_writeback }
   965	        on_C: { append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"spec_mutation","event":"spec_synthesis_deferred","reason":"confirm_mode_deferred_writeback","generatedFence":"deep-research/spec-findings","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}', proceed_to: step_update_config_status }
   966	
   967	      step_writeback_spec_findings:
   968	        action: "Write or replace the bounded generated findings block in spec.md before config completion"
   969	        edit: "{spec_folder}/spec.md"
   970	        host_anchor: "Use the chosen host anchor required by spec_check_protocol"
   971	        generated_fence_begin: "<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: deep-research/spec-findings -->"
   972	        generated_fence_end: "<!-- END GENERATED: deep-research/spec-findings -->"
   973	        fail_closed_conflict_check:
   974	          if_existing_generated_fence_present:
   975	            detect_manual_edits: "Use generated checksum metadata or an explicit MANUAL-EDIT marker inside the existing fence to detect human edits before overwrite."

## .opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml
   105	  delta_pattern: "{artifact_dir}/deltas/iter-{NNN}.jsonl"
   106	  review_output: "{artifact_dir}/review-report.md"
   107	  resource_map_output: "{artifact_dir}/resource-map.md"
   108	  archive_root: "{artifact_archive_root}"
   109	
   110	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   111	# WORKFLOW
   112	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   113	workflow:
   114	
   115	  step_resolve_artifact_root:
   116	    description: "Resolve artifact directory — use fan-out lineage override when provided, else resolve from spec_folder"
   117	    note: "Root specs keep review artifacts directly in {spec_folder}/review/. Child phases and sub-phases keep local packet directories in {spec_folder}/review/{packet}/, and archives stay local at {spec_folder}/review_archive/{packet}/."
   118	    branch_on: "config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir"
   119	    if_present:
   120	      bind:
   121	        artifact_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
   122	        artifact_root_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
   123	        artifact_subfolder: null
   124	        artifact_archive_root: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}/_archive"
   125	    if_absent:
   126	      command: "node -e \"const { resolveArtifactRoot } = require('.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/shared/review-research-paths.cjs'); console.log(JSON.stringify(resolveArtifactRoot('{spec_folder}', 'review')));\""
   127	      outputs:
   128	        - artifact_root_dir: "Resolved local review owner directory"
   129	        - artifact_subfolder: "Local packet subfolder ({ownerSlug}-pt-{NN}), else null"
   130	        - artifact_dir: "Resolved review packet directory for this target"
   131	        - artifact_archive_root: "Resolved local review archive directory for this target"
   132	
   133	  step_fanout_spawn:
   134	    description: "Spawn fan-out lineages; skip and proceed to phase_init normally when single-executor"
   135	    skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
   136	    instructions: |
   137	      Fan-out mode is active. Spawn all lineages. Each lineage runs the full loop in its own
   138	      isolated sub-packet under {artifact_dir}/lineages/{label}/.
   139	      After all lineages complete, jump directly to phase_synthesis — skip phase_init and
   140	      phase_main_loop entirely (those are the single-executor path). The merge step in
   141	      phase_synthesis will consolidate results across all lineages.
   142	    sub_steps:
   143	      step_fanout_spawn_cli:
   144	        description: "Spawn all CLI lineages in capped worker pool"
   145	        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind != 'native'"
   146	        command: |
   147	          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-run.cjs \
   148	            --spec-folder {spec_folder} \
   149	            --loop-type review \
   150	            --fanout-config-json '{config.fanout_json}' \
   151	            --base-artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
   152	        working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   153	        wait_for_completion: true
   154	      step_fanout_spawn_native:
   155	        description: "Dispatch each native lineage as a sequential deep-review sub-agent"
   156	        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind == 'native'"
   157	        for_each: "lineage in expanded native entries of config.fanout"
   158	        dispatch:
   159	          agent: deep-review
   160	          model: opus
   161	          context: |
   162	            Execute the deep-review loop with these parameters:
   163	              spec_folder: {spec_folder}
   164	              config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir: {artifact_dir}/lineages/{lineage.label}
   165	              session_id: fanout-{lineage.label}-{fanout_run_id}
   166	              executor: native
   167	            Run to convergence. Write all outputs to the override directory.
   168	        wait_for_completion: true
   169	
   170	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   171	  # PHASE 1: INITIALIZATION
   172	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   173	  phase_init:
   174	    purpose: Create all state files for the review session and resolve review scope
   175	    steps:
   176	
   177	      step_preflight_contract:
   178	        action: "Validate required setup bindings and executable workflow contract before any file writes"
   179	        verify:
   180	          - required_values_present: [review_target, review_target_type, review_dimensions, spec_folder, max_iterations, convergence_threshold]
   835	              writeFileSync(promptPath, built.promptFileBody, 'utf8');
   836	            }
   837	
   838	            const result = spawnSync('copilot', built.argv, {
   839	              cwd: '{repo_root}',
   840	              stdio: 'inherit',
   841	              timeout: Number('{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}') * 1000,
   842	            });
   843	            process.exit(result.status ?? 1);
   844	            EOF
   845	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   846	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   847	          wait_for_completion: true
   848	          notes:
   849	            - "copilot has no stdin support; prompt is positional"
   850	            - "Size check uses 16KB threshold; above that uses @PROMPT_PATH wrapper prompt"
   851	            - "Large-prompt path relies on copilot honoring @path references within its prompt string"
   852	            - "buildCopilotPromptArg attaches a TARGET AUTHORITY preamble bound to the workflow-approved spec folder; recovered context cannot override it (authority guard source: .opencode/commands/speckit/assets/speckit_deep-review_auto.yaml)"
   853	            - "If spec_folder is missing/malformed/unresolved on a write-intent dispatch, the helper enforces plan-only by replacing the prompt with a Gate-3 question and stripping --allow-all-tools"
   854	            - "Large-prompt wrapper mode rewrites the prompt file at promptPath to include the TARGET AUTHORITY preamble (prefix + divider + original body); the argv becomes a bare @promptPath reference"
   855	        if_cli_gemini:
   856	          command: |
   857	            gemini \
   858	              "$(cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')" \
   859	              -m "{config.executor.model}" \
   860	              -s none \
   861	              -y \
   862	              -o text
   863	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   864	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   865	          wait_for_completion: true
   866	          notes:
   867	            - "gemini accepts positional prompt or stdin; we use positional via command substitution"
   868	            - "gemini has no reasoningEffort or serviceTier flags; model is the only lever"
   869	            - "gemini model whitelist enforced at config parse (currently only gemini-3.1-pro-preview)"
   870	        if_cli_claude_code:
   871	          command: |
   872	            claude \
   873	              -p "$(cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')" \
   874	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   875	              --permission-mode acceptEdits \
   876	              --output-format text \
   877	              {optional_effort_flag}
   878	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   879	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   880	          wait_for_completion: true
   881	          render_hint:
   882	            optional_effort_flag: |
   883	              If config.executor.reasoningEffort is set and non-null, expand to: --effort {config.executor.reasoningEffort}
   884	              Otherwise expand to empty string.
   885	          notes:
   886	            - "claude-code default permission-mode is 'plan' (read-only); we override to 'acceptEdits' for iteration writes"
   887	            - "claude-code has no serviceTier flag"
   888	            - "claude-code supports --effort for reasoning depth"
   889	        if_cli_opencode:
   890	          command: |
   891	            opencode run \
   892	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   893	              --agent general \
   894	              --format json \
   895	              --dangerously-skip-permissions \
   896	              --pure \
   897	              --dir "{repo_root}" \
   898	              {optional_variant_flag} \
   899	              "$(cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')" \
   900	              </dev/null
   901	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   902	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   903	          wait_for_completion: true
   904	          render_hint:
   905	            optional_variant_flag: |
   906	              If config.executor.reasoningEffort is set and non-null, expand to: --variant {config.executor.reasoningEffort}
   907	              Otherwise expand to empty string.
   908	          notes:
   909	            - "opencode run takes a positional message; prompt is fed via command substitution"
   910	            - "--variant maps reasoningEffort to opencode's provider-specific reasoning lever (e.g., high, medium, minimal)"
   911	            - "--dangerously-skip-permissions enables hands-off automation; sandboxMode='read-only' is not currently honored (no opencode equivalent)"
   912	            - "cli-opencode self-invocation guard: this branch must only run from a non-OpenCode dispatch surface (Claude/Codex/Gemini/raw shell). The cli-opencode skill SKILL.md §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate"
   913	            - "</dev/null required: opencode v1.14.39 reads stdin at startup before session creation. Without explicit closed stdin, automation that redirects stdout/stderr hangs at 0% CPU after `+60s snapshot prune cleanup`. See cli-opencode SKILL.md §4 ALWAYS rule + memory feedback_opencode_run_requires_dev_null_stdin.md."
   914	        if_cli_devin:
   915	          command: |
   916	            AGENT_CONFIG_SRC="{repo_root}/.opencode/skills/cli-devin/assets/agent-config-deep-review-iter.json"
   917	            AGENT_CONFIG_TMP="{state_paths.prompt_dir}/agent-config-iter-{current_iteration}.json"
   918	            DEVIN_STDERR_TMP="{state_paths.prompt_dir}/devin-stderr-iter-{current_iteration}.log"
   919	            DEVIN_STDOUT_TMP="{state_paths.prompt_dir}/devin-stdout-iter-{current_iteration}.log"
   920	            sed -e "s|<repo-root>|{repo_root}|g" -e "s|<packet-root>|{spec_folder}|g" "$AGENT_CONFIG_SRC" > "$AGENT_CONFIG_TMP"
   921	            gtimeout 900 devin --print \
   922	              --prompt-file "{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md" \
   923	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   924	              --permission-mode "{resolved_permission_mode}" \
   925	              --agent-config "$AGENT_CONFIG_TMP" \
   926	              </dev/null \
   927	              > "$DEVIN_STDOUT_TMP" 2> "$DEVIN_STDERR_TMP"
   928	            DEVIN_EXIT=$?
   929	            cat "$DEVIN_STDOUT_TMP"
   930	            cat "$DEVIN_STDERR_TMP" >&2
   931	            if [ $DEVIN_EXIT -eq 124 ]; then
   932	              echo "ITER_OUTCOME=timeout" >&2
   933	            elif grep -q "A tool was rejected by the user" "$DEVIN_STDERR_TMP" 2>/dev/null; then
   934	              echo "ITER_OUTCOME=tool_rejected" >&2
   935	            elif grep -qE "(I cannot write|read-only mode|permission errors when attempting to write)" "$DEVIN_STDOUT_TMP" 2>/dev/null; then
   936	              echo "ITER_OUTCOME=degraded_stdout_fallback" >&2
   937	            else
   938	              echo "ITER_OUTCOME=clean" >&2
   939	            fi
   940	            exit $DEVIN_EXIT
   941	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   942	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   943	          wait_for_completion: true
   944	          render_hint:
   945	            resolved_permission_mode: |
   946	              Resolve via resolveDevinPermissionMode(config.executor.sandboxMode) — defined in
   947	              .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts.
   948	              Mapping: sandboxMode='danger-full-access' → 'dangerous', everything else → 'auto'.
   949	              Default (sandboxMode unset): 'auto'.
   950	            agent_config_recipe: |
   951	              The review-iter recipe at .opencode/skills/cli-devin/assets/agent-config-deep-review-iter.json
   952	              ships with literal "<repo-root>" and "<packet-root>" placeholders. The command block substitutes
   953	              them via sed at dispatch time and writes the result to {state_paths.prompt_dir}/agent-config-iter-NNN.json,
   954	              then passes that path to devin --agent-config. The recipe pins the narrower allowed_tools
   955	              (Read+Grep+Glob, no Bash) and Read-only permissions.allow at Devin's strict parser. The narrow
   956	              Write scope (v1.0.4.0) is anchored at <packet-root> = {spec_folder} so iterations may only persist
   957	              artifacts inside the current packet directory.
   958	              Contract: .opencode/skills/cli-devin/references/deep-loop-iter-contract.md.
   959	              Recipe authoring: .opencode/skills/cli-devin/references/agent-config-recipes.md.
   960	          notes:
   961	            - "devin --prompt-file accepts a path to the rendered iteration prompt (the SKILL.md skill_reference dispatch shape)"
   962	            - "Supported models: swe-1.6 (default), deepseek-v4, glm-5.1, kimi-k2.6 (per DEVIN_SUPPORTED_MODELS in executor-config.ts)"
   963	            - "--permission-mode auto auto-approves read-only ops and prompts on write; dangerous auto-approves all (only for sandboxed runs)"
   964	            - "--agent-config pins the review-iter profile (narrower than research-iter — Read+Grep+Glob only, no Bash) at Devin's strict parser. The recipe at cli-devin/assets/agent-config-deep-review-iter.json is substituted via sed at dispatch time to resolve the <repo-root> and <packet-root> placeholders per the recipe authoring contract."
   965	            - "cli-devin self-invocation guard: this branch must only run from a non-Devin dispatch surface (Claude/Codex/Gemini/OpenCode/raw shell). The cli-devin skill SKILL.md §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate."
   966	            - "</dev/null required: family convention for non-interactive dispatch to avoid stdin-blocking edge cases across CLI versions"
   967	            - "Cloud handoff is NOT used here — each iteration runs locally with convergence detection. See cli-devin references/cloud_handoff.md for the separate cloud-handoff route."
   968	            - "Reasoning effort is NOT exposed by Devin's CLI surface; reasoning depth is fixed per model (e.g., swe-1.6 vs deepseek-v4). serviceTier is also N/A."
   969	            - "v1.0.4.0: dispatch wrapped in gtimeout 900 (15 min cap per iter) to prevent silent hangs; exit code 124 is gtimeout's signal and surfaces as ITER_OUTCOME=timeout on stderr"
   970	            - "v1.0.4.0: stderr captured to {state_paths.prompt_dir}/devin-stderr-iter-NNN.log and scanned for 'A tool was rejected by the user' (Devin runtime approval gate firing inside --permission-mode auto); ITER_OUTCOME=tool_rejected flagged so the post_dispatch_validate / reducer can skip the iter cleanly without inheriting a stuck-style failure"
   971	            - "v1.0.4.0: stdout captured to {state_paths.prompt_dir}/devin-stdout-iter-NNN.log and scanned for stdout-fallback boilerplate ('I cannot write', 'read-only mode', 'permission errors when attempting to write'); ITER_OUTCOME=degraded_stdout_fallback flagged so the JSONL row can be tagged dispatch_quality=degraded for the synthesis phase"
   972	            - "v1.0.4.0: <packet-root> substitution added to the agent-config sed pipeline so the review-iter recipe's narrow Write scope resolves to {spec_folder} at dispatch time"
   973	        post_dispatch_validate:
   974	          validator: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/post-dispatch-validate.ts#validateIterationOutputs"
   975	          assert_exists: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
  1155	          stuck_count: |
  1156	            if status == 'thought': unchanged (skip)
  1157	            if status == 'insight': 0 (reset)
  1158	            if newFindingsRatio <= 0.05: stuck_count + 1
  1159	            else: 0
  1160	        log: "Iteration {N} complete. Dimensions: {dimensions}. newFindingsRatio: {newFindingsRatio}. Findings: P0={severity_counts.P0} P1={severity_counts.P1} P2={severity_counts.P2}. Stuck count: {stuck_count}."
  1161	
  1162	      step_loop_decision:
  1163	        action: "Return to step_read_state for next iteration"
  1164	        goto: step_read_state
  1165	
  1166	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  1167	  # PHASE 3: SYNTHESIS
  1168	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  1169	  phase_synthesis:
  1170	    purpose: Compile all iteration findings into review/review-report.md
  1171	    steps:
  1172	
  1173	      step_fanout_merge:
  1174	        description: "Merge N lineage registries with strongest-restriction; bind p0/p1/p2 counts for step_derive_verdict; skip when single-executor"
  1175	        skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"

## .opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_confirm.yaml
   105	  delta_pattern: "{artifact_dir}/deltas/iter-{NNN}.jsonl"
   106	  review_output: "{artifact_dir}/review-report.md"
   107	  resource_map_output: "{artifact_dir}/resource-map.md"
   108	  archive_root: "{artifact_archive_root}"
   109	
   110	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   111	# WORKFLOW
   112	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   113	workflow:
   114	
   115	  step_resolve_artifact_root:
   116	    description: "Resolve artifact directory — use fan-out lineage override when provided, else resolve from spec_folder"
   117	    note: "Root specs keep review artifacts directly in {spec_folder}/review/. Child phases and sub-phases keep local packet directories in {spec_folder}/review/{packet}/, and archives stay local at {spec_folder}/review_archive/{packet}/."
   118	    branch_on: "config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir"
   119	    if_present:
   120	      bind:
   121	        artifact_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
   122	        artifact_root_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
   123	        artifact_subfolder: null
   124	        artifact_archive_root: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}/_archive"
   125	    if_absent:
   126	      command: "node -e \"const { resolveArtifactRoot } = require('.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/shared/review-research-paths.cjs'); console.log(JSON.stringify(resolveArtifactRoot('{spec_folder}', 'review')));\""
   127	      outputs:
   128	        - artifact_root_dir: "Resolved local review owner directory"
   129	        - artifact_subfolder: "Local packet subfolder ({ownerSlug}-pt-{NN}), else null"
   130	        - artifact_dir: "Resolved review packet directory for this target"
   131	        - artifact_archive_root: "Resolved local review archive directory for this target"
   132	
   133	  step_fanout_spawn:
   134	    description: "Spawn fan-out lineages; skip and proceed to phase_init normally when single-executor"
   135	    skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
   136	    instructions: |
   137	      Fan-out mode is active. Spawn all lineages. Each lineage runs the full loop in its own
   138	      isolated sub-packet under {artifact_dir}/lineages/{label}/.
   139	      After all lineages complete, jump directly to phase_synthesis — skip phase_init and
   140	      phase_main_loop entirely (those are the single-executor path). The merge step in
   141	      phase_synthesis will consolidate results across all lineages.
   142	    sub_steps:
   143	      step_fanout_spawn_cli:
   144	        description: "Spawn all CLI lineages in capped worker pool"
   145	        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind != 'native'"
   146	        command: |
   147	          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-run.cjs \
   148	            --spec-folder {spec_folder} \
   149	            --loop-type review \
   150	            --fanout-config-json '{config.fanout_json}' \
   151	            --base-artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
   152	        working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   153	        wait_for_completion: true
   154	      step_fanout_spawn_native:
   155	        description: "Dispatch each native lineage as a sequential deep-review sub-agent"
   156	        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind == 'native'"
   157	        for_each: "lineage in expanded native entries of config.fanout"
   158	        dispatch:
   159	          agent: deep-review
   160	          model: opus
   161	          context: |
   162	            Execute the deep-review loop with these parameters:
   163	              spec_folder: {spec_folder}
   164	              config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir: {artifact_dir}/lineages/{lineage.label}
   165	              session_id: fanout-{lineage.label}-{fanout_run_id}
   166	              executor: native
   167	            Run to convergence. Write all outputs to the override directory.
   168	        wait_for_completion: true
   169	
   170	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   171	  # PHASE 1: INITIALIZATION
   172	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   173	  phase_init:
   174	    purpose: Create all state files for the review session and resolve review scope
   175	    steps:
   176	
   177	      step_preflight_contract:
   178	        action: "Validate required setup bindings and executable workflow contract before any file writes"
   179	        verify:
   180	          - required_values_present: [review_target, review_target_type, review_dimensions, spec_folder, max_iterations, convergence_threshold]
   835	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   836	              --permission-mode acceptEdits \
   837	              --output-format text \
   838	              {optional_effort_flag}
   839	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   840	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   841	          wait_for_completion: true
   842	          render_hint:
   843	            optional_effort_flag: |
   844	              If config.executor.reasoningEffort is set and non-null, expand to: --effort {config.executor.reasoningEffort}
   845	              Otherwise expand to empty string.
   846	          notes:
   847	            - "claude-code default permission-mode is 'plan' (read-only); we override to 'acceptEdits' for iteration writes"
   848	            - "claude-code has no serviceTier flag"
   849	            - "claude-code supports --effort for reasoning depth"
   850	        if_cli_opencode:
   851	          command: |
   852	            opencode run \
   853	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   854	              --agent general \
   855	              --format json \
   856	              --dangerously-skip-permissions \
   857	              --pure \
   858	              --dir "{repo_root}" \
   859	              {optional_variant_flag} \
   860	              "$(cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')" \
   861	              </dev/null
   862	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   863	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   864	          wait_for_completion: true
   865	          render_hint:
   866	            optional_variant_flag: |
   867	              If config.executor.reasoningEffort is set and non-null, expand to: --variant {config.executor.reasoningEffort}
   868	              Otherwise expand to empty string.
   869	          notes:
   870	            - "opencode run takes a positional message; prompt is fed via command substitution"
   871	            - "--variant maps reasoningEffort to opencode's provider-specific reasoning lever (e.g., high, medium, minimal)"
   872	            - "--dangerously-skip-permissions enables hands-off automation; sandboxMode='read-only' is not currently honored (no opencode equivalent)"
   873	            - "cli-opencode self-invocation guard: this branch must only run from a non-OpenCode dispatch surface (Claude/Codex/Gemini/raw shell). The cli-opencode skill SKILL.md §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate"
   874	            - "</dev/null required: opencode v1.14.39 reads stdin at startup before session creation. Without explicit closed stdin, automation that redirects stdout/stderr hangs at 0% CPU after `+60s snapshot prune cleanup`. See cli-opencode SKILL.md §4 ALWAYS rule + memory feedback_opencode_run_requires_dev_null_stdin.md."
   875	        if_cli_devin:
   876	          command: |
   877	            devin --print \
   878	              --prompt-file "{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md" \
   879	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   880	              --permission-mode "{resolved_permission_mode}" \
   881	              2>&1 </dev/null
   882	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   883	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   884	          wait_for_completion: true
   885	          render_hint:
   886	            resolved_permission_mode: |
   887	              Resolve via resolveDevinPermissionMode(config.executor.sandboxMode) — defined in
   888	              .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts.
   889	              Mapping: sandboxMode='danger-full-access' → 'dangerous', everything else → 'auto'.
   890	              Default (sandboxMode unset): 'auto'.
   891	          notes:
   892	            - "devin --prompt-file accepts a path to the rendered iteration prompt (the SKILL.md skill_reference dispatch shape)"
   893	            - "Supported models: swe-1.6 (default), deepseek-v4, glm-5.1, kimi-k2.6 (per DEVIN_SUPPORTED_MODELS in executor-config.ts)"
   894	            - "--permission-mode auto auto-approves read-only ops and prompts on write; dangerous auto-approves all (only for sandboxed runs)"
   895	            - "cli-devin self-invocation guard: this branch must only run from a non-Devin dispatch surface (Claude/Codex/Gemini/OpenCode/raw shell). The cli-devin skill SKILL.md §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate."
   896	            - "</dev/null required: family convention for non-interactive dispatch to avoid stdin-blocking edge cases across CLI versions"
   897	            - "Cloud handoff is NOT used here — each iteration runs locally with convergence detection. See cli-devin references/cloud_handoff.md for the separate cloud-handoff route."
   898	            - "Reasoning effort is NOT exposed by Devin's CLI surface; reasoning depth is fixed per model (e.g., swe-1.6 vs deepseek-v4). serviceTier is also N/A."

   943	
   944	      step_evaluate_results:

   946	        verify:
   947	          - file_exists: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
   948	          - jsonl_appended: "New iteration record in state.jsonl"

   950	        extract:

   952	          - findings_count: "From latest JSONL iteration record"

   959	        on_missing_outputs:

   961	
   962	      step_post_iteration_claim_adjudication:
   963	        action: "Validate typed claim-adjudication packets for any new P0/P1 findings and persist the result to state.jsonl so the next iteration's claimAdjudicationGate can read it"
   964	        verify:
   965	          - typed_packets_present: "Every new P0/P1 finding in review/iterations/iteration-{NNN}.md contains a claim-adjudication JSON block"
   966	          - packet_fields: "Each packet includes claim, evidenceRefs, counterevidenceSought, alternativeExplanation, finalSeverity, confidence, downgradeTrigger"
   967	          - missing_packet_ids: "List of new P0/P1 finding IDs that are missing a typed packet or field; empty array when all packets validate"
   968	        on_pass:
   969	          set:
   970	            claim_adjudication_passed: true
   971	          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"claim_adjudication","mode":"review","run":{current_iteration},"passed":true,"activeP0P1":{active_p0_p1_count},"missingPackets":[],"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{session_id}","generation":{generation}}'
   972	          log: "Claim adjudication passed for iteration {current_iteration}. All new P0/P1 findings have typed packets."
   973	        on_fail:
   974	          action: "Mark the iteration as invalid for convergence. The next iteration's claimAdjudicationGate (step_check_convergence step 0) reads the persisted `passed: false` event and vetoes STOP until a follow-up iteration rewrites the packets."
   975	          set:
  1155	      # H-1 verdict derivation: parse findings JSONL, map highest severity to verdict
  1156	      # - PASS: no P0 or P1 findings (P2-only or clean)
  1157	      # - CONDITIONAL: any P1 findings (no P0)
  1158	      # - FAIL: any P0 findings
  1159	      # Final line of iteration-NNN.md MUST be exactly: "Review verdict: PASS" / "Review verdict: CONDITIONAL" / "Review verdict: FAIL"
  1160	      step_derive_verdict:
  1161	        action: "Derive review verdict from accumulated findings"
  1162	        algorithm: |
  1163	          if p0_count > 0:
  1164	            verdict = "FAIL"
  1165	          elif p1_count > 0:
  1166	            verdict = "CONDITIONAL"
  1167	          else:
  1168	            verdict = "PASS"
  1169	          has_advisories = (verdict == "PASS" and p2_count > 0)
  1170	        outputs:
  1171	          - verdict: "PASS | CONDITIONAL | FAIL"
  1172	          - has_advisories: "Boolean true when verdict is PASS and any active P2 findings exist"
  1173	        contract: |
  1174	          Every iteration-NNN.md must end with exactly: "Review verdict: PASS" (or CONDITIONAL or FAIL).
  1175	          Downstream automation parses this final line via exact string match — do not vary the format.

.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:158:   - Invalid combinations fail fast with clear errors, including `cli-codex` without `--model` and reserved-but-unwired executor kinds
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:189:     C) cli-gemini — `gemini "PROMPT" -m gemini-3.1-pro-preview -y -o text`. Single supported model currently. No reasoning-effort or service-tier.
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:190:     D) cli-claude-code — `claude -p "PROMPT" --model X --permission-mode acceptEdits` with optional --effort. No service-tier.

   126	        - artifact_archive_root: "Resolved local research archive directory for this target"
   127	
   128	  step_fanout_spawn:
   129	    description: "Spawn fan-out lineages; skip and proceed to phase_init normally when single-executor"
   130	    skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
   131	    instructions: |
   132	      Fan-out mode is active. Spawn all lineages. Each lineage runs the full loop in its own
   133	      isolated sub-packet under {artifact_dir}/lineages/{label}/.
   134	      After all lineages complete, jump directly to phase_synthesis — skip phase_init and
   135	      phase_main_loop entirely (those are the single-executor path). The merge step in
   136	      phase_synthesis will consolidate results across all lineages.
   137	    sub_steps:
   138	      step_fanout_spawn_cli:
   139	        description: "Spawn all CLI lineages in capped worker pool"
   140	        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind != 'native'"
   141	        command: |
   142	          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-run.cjs \
   143	            --spec-folder {spec_folder} \
   144	            --loop-type research \
   145	            --fanout-config-json '{config.fanout_json}' \
   146	            --base-artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
   147	        working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   148	        wait_for_completion: true
   149	      step_fanout_spawn_native:
   150	        description: "Dispatch each native lineage as a sequential deep-research sub-agent"
   151	        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind == 'native'"
   152	        for_each: "lineage in expanded native entries of config.fanout"
   153	        dispatch:
   154	          agent: deep-research
   155	          model: opus
   156	          context: |
   157	            Execute the deep-research loop with these parameters:
   158	              spec_folder: {spec_folder}
   159	              config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir: {artifact_dir}/lineages/{lineage.label}
   160	              session_id: fanout-{lineage.label}-{fanout_run_id}
   161	              executor: native
   162	            Run to convergence. Write all outputs to the override directory.
   163	        wait_for_completion: true
   164	
   165	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   166	  # PHASE 1: INITIALIZATION
   167	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   168	  phase_init:
   169	    purpose: Create all state files for the research session
   170	    steps:
   171	
   172	      step_preflight_contract:
   173	        action: "Validate required setup bindings and executable workflow contract before any file writes"
   174	        verify:
   175	          - required_values_present: [research_topic, spec_folder, max_iterations, convergence_threshold]
   176	          - spec_folder_is_within: "specs/ or .opencode/specs/ (canonicalize alias roots before validation)"
   177	          - unresolved_placeholders: "FAIL if any user-facing template references placeholders not produced by earlier steps"
   178	          - tool_contract: "FAIL if executable steps reference tools outside the command allowlist"
   179	        on_fail: "Halt with STATUS=FAIL and report the missing binding or unsupported contract reference"
   180	
   820	
   821	      step_update_tracking:
   822	        action: "Update loop tracking variables"
   823	        set:
   824	          current_iteration: "{current_iteration + 1}"
   825	          stuck_count: "if status == 'thought': unchanged (skip). if status == 'insight': 0 (reset). if newInfoRatio < convergence_threshold: stuck_count + 1, else: 0"
   826	
   827	      step_loop_decision:
   828	        action: "Return to step_read_state for next iteration"
   829	        goto: step_read_state
   830	
   831	      # ─── WAVE ORCHESTRATION ───
   832	      # Wave mode is auto-only and conflicts with per-iteration approval gates.
   833	      # See spec_kit_deep-research_auto.yaml for wave steps.
   834	
   835	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   836	  # PHASE 3: SYNTHESIS
   837	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   838	  phase_synthesis:
   839	    purpose: Compile all iteration findings into final research/research.md
   840	    steps:
   841	
   842	      step_fanout_merge:
   843	        description: "Merge N lineage registries into one consolidated registry; skip when single-executor"
   844	        skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
   845	        command: |
   930	        action: "Generate and append convergence report"
   931	        report: |
   932	          ## Convergence Report
   933	          - Stop reason: {reason}
   934	          - Total iterations: {iteration_count}
   935	          - Questions answered: {answered_count} / {total_questions}
   936	          - Remaining questions: {remaining_questions}
   937	          - Last 3 iteration summaries: {last_3_summaries}
   938	          - Convergence threshold: {convergence_threshold}
   939	          - Segment transitions, wave scores, and checkpoint metrics are experimental and omitted from the live report.
   940	        append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"synthesis_complete","totalIterations":{iteration_count},"answeredCount":{answered_count},"totalQuestions":{total_questions},"stopReason":"{reason}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   941	
   942	      gate_post_synthesis_spec_writeback:
   943	        type: approval_gate
   944	        purpose: "Approve bounded spec.md write-back before memory-save review"
   945	        present: |

   177	              executor: native
   178	            Run to convergence. Write all outputs to the override directory.

  1166	      - "Dispatch up to 3 parallel agents on distinct questions."
  1167	      - "Score wave results by median newInfoRatio and promote top branches."

codex
I found one behavior-level mismatch: the CLI fan-out path is documented as capped parallelism, but the runner uses a blocking subprocess call inside the pool worker. I’m doing a last pass for stale command docs and deferred-wave wording before writing the verdict.

    74	### Resource Domains
    75	
    76	```text
    77	lib/deep-loop/*.ts            # 10 runtime modules (executor, prompt-pack, validation, state, scoring, routing)
    78	lib/coverage-graph/*.ts       # 3 schema + query + signals modules
    79	scripts/*.cjs                 # 4 entry points (convergence, upsert, query, status)
    80	database/*.sqlite              # runtime-owned SQLite (deep-loop-graph.sqlite)
    81	tests/{unit,integration,lifecycle}/  # 21+ vitest files split by responsibility
    82	```
   155	### Script Entry Points
   156	
   157	Four `.cjs` scripts replace the 4 deleted MCP tools, each honoring the same JSON-in / JSON-out contract documented in ADR-001 (the script interface contract):
   158	
   159	| Script | Replaces | Purpose | Exit codes |
   160	|--------|----------|---------|------------|
   161	| `scripts/convergence.cjs` | `deep_loop_graph_convergence` | Computes typed CONTINUE / STOP_ALLOWED / STOP_BLOCKED decisions | 0=ok, 1=script, 2=DB, 3=input |
   162	| `scripts/upsert.cjs` | `deep_loop_graph_upsert` | Stores nodes + edges from iteration `graphEvents` | 0=ok, 1=script, 2=DB, 3=input |
   163	| `scripts/query.cjs` | `deep_loop_graph_query` | Inspects uncovered questions, unverified claims, contradictions | 0=ok, 1=script, 2=DB, 3=input |
   164	| `scripts/status.cjs` | `deep_loop_graph_status` | Session-scoped health report | 0=ok, 1=script, 2=DB, 3=input |
   165	| `scripts/fanout-pool.cjs` | n/a (new) | Concurrency-capped worker pool + status ledger for fan-out lineages | exports only (no main) |
   166	| `scripts/fanout-run.cjs` | n/a (new) | CLI lineage pool driver — spawns N headless CLI subprocesses (codex, claude, opencode, gemini, devin), each running the full loop in `lineages/{label}/`; salvage sweep via fanout-salvage.cjs after each subprocess exits | 0=all ok, 2=some failed, 3=all failed |
   167	| `scripts/fanout-salvage.cjs` | n/a (new) | Write-failure salvage: recovers missing iteration .md files from captured subprocess stdout; per-sessionId isolation preserved | exports only (no main) |
   168	| `scripts/fanout-merge.cjs` | n/a (new) | Cross-lineage merge: research (dedup by id + attribution) or review (strongest-restriction P0 rollup) → consolidated registry + fanout-attribution.md | 0=ok, 3=input |
   169	
   170	**Fan-out isolation invariant:** each CLI lineage receives its own `{base}/lineages/{label}/` artifact dir (via `config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir` override in `step_resolve_artifact_root`) and its own `session_id` for `convergence.cjs` + coverage-graph DB writes (PK includes session_id — no schema change, no collision). Same-kind replicas get distinct `SPECKIT_<KIND>_STATE_DIR` values to prevent lockfile contention.
